name: wifite2
summary: This repo is a complete re-write of [`wifite`](https://github.com/derv82/wifite), a Python script for auditing wireless networks.

documentation.readme: This repo is a complete re-write of [`wifite`](https://github.com/derv82/wifite), a Python script for auditing wireless networks.

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --port
arguments.description: Target port (default: service default).

arguments.name: --interface
arguments.description: Network interface to bind to (e.g. wlan0mon, eth0).

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --threads
arguments.description: Number of concurrent workers.

arguments.name: --timeout
arguments.description: Per-operation timeout in seconds.

arguments.name: --rate
arguments.description: Packet / request rate limit (packets/sec).

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --proxy
arguments.description: HTTP or SOCKS proxy URL for outbound requests.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/wifite2 && python3 wifite2.py --help`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/wifite2 && cat README.md`; `cd toolboxes/wifite2 && ls -la`. This repo is a complete re-write of [`wifite`](https://github.com/derv82/wifite), a Python script for auditing wireless networks.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [wifi_2_4_ghz, wifi_5_ghz, shell_linux] in the Wireless category. Fits when the engagement needs: This repo is a complete re-write of [`wifite`](https://github.com/derv82/wifite), a Python script for auditing wireless networks.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: This repo is a complete re-write of [`wifite`](https://github.com/derv82/wifite), a Python script for auditing wireless networks.
